ResourceDto.description: Data Transfer Object for organization response.

indices.description: List of indices associated with the organization
indices.title: Indices

ResourceDto.title: ResourceDto

major_version.description: Major version number of the index schema. It should be incremented when there are breaking changes in the schema which requires reindexing of data.
major_version.title: Major Version

minor_version.description: Minor version number of the index schema. It should be incremented when there are non-breaking changes in the schema which does not require reindexing of data.
minor_version.title: Minor Version

patch_version.description: Patch version number of the index schema. It should be incremented when there are minor changes in the schema such as adding new properties which does not require reindexing of data.
patch_version.title: Patch Version

last_attempted_provisioned_at.description: Timestamp when the index was last provisioned
last_attempted_provisioned_at.title: Last Attempted Provisioned At

provision_status.description: Provision status of the index. It can be one of 'pending', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'failed'
provision_status.title: Provision Status

ManageResourceDto.description: Data Transfer Object for managing organization information.
ManageResourceDto.title: ManageResourceDto
